scripts.install:root: bash -lc "set -e; if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then npm ci; else npm install; fi"
scripts.install:webapp: bash -lc "set -e; if [ -f webapp/package-lock.json ]; then npm --prefix webapp ci; else npm --prefix webapp install; fi"
scripts.install:all: npm run install:root && npm run install:webapp
scripts.build: npm run install:root && npm run install:webapp && npm run build:webapp
